About Me
Get to know me
Working Hard, Having Fun, The rest will be History ✌ Operations and program management leader with 8+ years of experience driving efficiency, innovation, and customer-centric solutions across fast-paced environments. Currently leading Remote Ops at Amazon India's GSF division, managing a team of 49 and driving standardization across complex operational networks. At Amazon, I've progressed from an Operation Executive to Manager — launching Hybrid Stores, building ACES frameworks, executing city-level transitions, and spearheading community impact initiatives. My approach combines deep operational rigor with a passion for simplification — whether it's consolidating 83 action items into a single tracker before Jupiter, or partnering with SHGs to create sustainable bag repair programs across 4 cities. Before Amazon, I built a strong foundation in supply chain management at Mahindra Logistics — managing 150+ transporters for M&M's automotive outbound logistics and improving OTD from 75% to 95%. At ICICI Bank, I honed my data and stakeholder skills managing MIS for credit cards and personal loans across the West Mega Zone. I'm passionate about building high-performing teams, leveraging data-driven insights for informed decisions, and turning complex operations into scalable, standardized processes. Always looking ahead — exploring how technology, automation, and community partnerships can reshape last-mile operations at scale.

Pre-Amazon Journey
Where it all started
Supply Chain Executive — Outbound Logistics
Mahindra Logistics Ltd
Mumbai📅 Aug 2018 – Aug 2020

Managed outbound logistics for Mahindra & Mahindra's automotive division. Oversaw vehicle movement tracking (GPS/Non-GPS), route performance optimization, and fleet management of 150+ transporters. Drove OTD performance from 75% to 95% for Nashik plant. Created SOPs for the MLL Auto Outbound Process.

MIS Officer — Credit Cards & Personal Loans
ICICI Bank Ltd
Mumbai📅 Jun 2016 – Aug 2018

Managed MIS for Credit Cards, Personal Loans (Unsecured) & Business Loans (Secured) across West Mega Zone. Drove CC and PL business through ICICI Bank branches, initiated promotional schemes, and structured innovative deals in working capital and project finance. Received appreciation from Zonal Head for driving March 2018 sales.

Customer Service Professional
Sitel India Pvt Ltd
Mumbai📅 May 2015 – Mar 2016

Handled ICICI Lombard Health Insurance outbound sales. Managed end-to-end sales cycle from lead generation to policy conversion, consistently achieving monthly targets. Cross-sold health insurance products across the portfolio.
